_comment: Firecracker VM config reconstructed from live sandbox inspection.
_comment2: Confirmed values: kernel cmdline, MAC, MTU, memory, vCPU, disk sizes, virtio devices.
_comment3: Replace file paths with your actual paths.

boot-source._comment: Custom kernel 6.18.5, compiled Wed Jan 14 17:56:08 UTC 2026.
boot-source._comment2: Key config: CONFIG_HZ=250, PREEMPT_DYNAMIC, SQUASHFS+zstd, FUSE+io_uring, no modules.
boot-source.boot_args: console=ttyS0 reboot=k panic=1 nomodule random.trust_cpu=1 ipv6.disable=1 swiotlb=noforce rdinit=/process_api init_on_free=1 -- --firecracker-init --addr 0.0.0.0:2024 --max-ws-buffer-size 32768 --block-local-connections
boot-source._comment3: process_api is embedded in the initrd (device 00:02, inode 5), not on rootfs.

machine-config._comment2: track_dirty_pages=true is required for snapshot/snapstart support.

drives._comment: 256GB sparse ext4. UUID zeroed. Reserved blocks=91% (233GB), usable ~18GB.
drives._comment3: No journal (O ^has_journal) for faster boot. Last mounted at /mnt during build.

drives._comment: squashfs, zstd compression, 128KB block size, 2 inodes, ~9.9MB.
drives._comment2: Contains only the rclone-filestore binary. Mount point: /opt/rclone/
Contains public skill files. Mount point: /mnt/skills/public/
Contains example/operator skill files. Mount point: /mnt/skills/examples/
drives._comment3: Created: 2026-05-06 21:01:50. Same timestamp as skills-public (built together).

network-interfaces._comment: 02:fc prefix = locally administered unicast. Anthropic convention.
network-interfaces._comment2: Host TAP device. Gateway MAC will be 02:fc:00:00:00:05 (observed in ARP table).
network-interfaces._comment3: MTU must be set to 1400 on both TAP and guest eth0 to account for VXLAN overlay on AWS VPC.

vsock._comment: vsock device present (/dev/vsock exists, PF_VSOCK registered).
vsock._comment2: Not actively used in standard chat sessions but process_api supports --listen-vsock-port.
vsock._comment3: Uncomment if you need vsock transport instead of TCP.

entropy._comment2: Combined with random.trust_cpu=1 (RDRAND), entropy is instant at boot.
entropy._comment3: Firecracker exposes this automatically - no extra config needed.

mmds-config._comment2: The egress proxy blocks 169.254.169.254 with x-deny-reason: private_dest_ip.
mmds-config._comment3: Keeping MMDS disabled prevents any metadata leakage from inside the VM.

snapshot._comment: Snapstart is the key performance feature. Two-phase boot:
snapshot._comment2: Phase 1 (template): Boot VM fresh, let process_api signal SNAPSTART_READY, take snapshot.
snapshot._comment3: Phase 2 (resume): Restore snapshot, POST /mount_root with session-specific rclone config.
snapshot._comment4: The VM gen counter (ACPI FCVMGID) increments on resume, triggering crng reseed.
snapshot._comment5: Observed boot time from snapshot: ~8.3s kernel-to-ready.

tap_setup: ip tuntap add fc-tap0 mode tap
ip link set fc-tap0 mtu 1400 up
guest_network_setup: ip link set eth0 mtu 1400 up
reserved_blocks._comment: Sets 91% reserved to enforce ~18GB usable quota. Requires CAP_SYS_RESOURCE (drop it after).
cgroup_setup._comment: process_api creates per-tool-call UUID sub-cgroups automatically.
cgroup_setup._comment2: No hard memory limit set at cgroup level - Firecracker guest RAM is the real limit.
